name: Fireman Rescue Maze
description: Fireman Rescue Maze is a free online maze game for boys. In the game, you will become a fireman and take part in fire fighting. You need to avoid various obstacles, put out the fire and take the trapped people out of the building. There are various levels in the game. Are you confident to surpass them? Come and challenge!
tags: 3D, Android, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Fire, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Maze, Obstacle, Online, Puzzle, Rescue
